attacking_style: Long-range breakaway specialist willing to commit to 190km+ efforts. Reserves sprint for finale rather than attacking late from break.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team support. Victory came from individual breakaway effort with superior energy management over rivals.
terrain_preference: Flat to rolling stages suited to very long breakaways where endurance and sprint economy trump pure power. Thrives when rivals have conflicting team interests.
vulnerability: Lacks superior sprint credentials - relies on draining rivals' energy over extreme distances and exploiting tactical compromises in break composition.
key_patterns: Commits to ultra-long breakaways exceeding 190km requiring elite energy management
Tactically patient within breaks, waiting for finale rather than premature attacking
Exploits team dynamic conflicts among breakaway companions to neutralize stronger sprinters
form_trajectory: unknown: single observation from 2017, insufficient recent data for trajectory assessment
